title: ononis alba var. tuna
intro: Ononis alba var. tuna, also known as White Restharrow, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to the Mediterranean region and is characterized by its white flowers and hairy stems. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects due to the presence of isoflavones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of White Restharrow include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. White Restharrow can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
